title: BSMP Reforged
description: A mix of magic, machinery, and exploration Modpack for my friends server — My latest attempt to keep a Minecraft server alive for more than three days...
body:
This modpack was created for a private server shared among friends, aiming to provide a smooth and enjoyable Minecraft experience.
It combines carefully selected mods to enhance gameplay and keeping performance, stability, and fun in perfect balance.

Explore a world filled with powerful bosses, mystical spells, and complex machinery powered by the Create mod.

Designed exclusively for private use, this modpack serves as the foundation of our personal multiplayer world.
**Oh, and it’s also my latest attempt to keep a Minecraft server alive for more than three days. Wish luck...**
